bio: I'm Leo Falkovsky, a mortgage broker and real estate agent based in Barrie, Ontario. I specialize in Manulife One, Smith Manoeuvre, Cash Damming, and mortgage acceleration strategies that help homeowners build real wealth — not just pay off a house.
credentials: FSRA Licensed Mortgage Broker, Accredited Mortgage Professional (AMP), Licensed Real Estate Agent
whyWorkWithMe: Most brokers find you a rate. I find you a strategy. There's a significant difference between getting a mortgage and building a mortgage plan that accelerates your net worth. That's what I focus on.
